_about: Waveset Crunch — CDP-style waveset distortion on a sustained source. sndfile~ (auto-loads sounds/tonal/drone.wav) -> wsdistort~ -> dac~, with a scope on the output. wsdistort~ segments the stream at zero-crossings and rebuilds it from transformed wavesets. Try the mode dropdown: 'repeat' (count 2-3) drops a sub-octave buzz; 'telescope'/'average' (raise group) pitch up and roughen; 'reverse' adds grit; 'reform' swaps the timbre for a raw waveform; 'omit' (keep/skip) gates rhythmically. Start Audio, then Play. Swap the source via the sndfile~ dropdown.
